title: Junior Mechanical Engineer
description: Assist senior engineers in designing mechanical components, perform simulations, and support manufacturing processes. Strong knowledge of AutoCAD and SolidWorks required.

title: Senior Civil Engineer
description: Lead infrastructure projects from design through completion. Requires 5+ years of experience in bridge and highway construction.

title: Electrical Engineer
description: Design and maintain electrical systems for commercial buildings. Experience with PLC programming is a plus.

title: Architect – Residential Projects
description: Design modern residential homes with a focus on sustainability and aesthetic appeal. Proficiency in Revit, SketchUp and 3ds Max required.

title: Interior Architect
description: Create functional and aesthetically pleasing interior spaces for commercial and residential clients. Portfolio required.

title: Urban Planner
description: Develop comprehensive urban plans and zoning strategies. Work closely with government agencies and community stakeholders.

title: Mobile Repair Technician
description: Diagnose and repair smartphones, tablets, and other mobile devices. Experience with micro-soldering and board-level repairs preferred.

title: Senior Mobile Technician
description: Lead a team of repair technicians. Handle complex repairs including water damage recovery and data retrieval.

title: Mobile Shop Manager
description: Manage daily operations of a mobile repair shop. Coordinate between customers, technicians, and suppliers.

title: Professional Truck Driver
description: Transport goods across the country. Maintain vehicle logs and ensure timely deliveries. Valid HGV license required.

title: Ride-Share Driver
description: Drive passengers safely within the city. Flexible hours, must own a vehicle and have a clean driving record.

title: Delivery Courier
description: Deliver parcels and documents within the metropolitan area. Motorcycle or bicycle required.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, social media, and email. Analyze ROI and optimize ad spend for maximum impact.

title: Social Media Specialist
description: Create engaging content for Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Grow follower base and drive brand awareness through creative storytelling.

title: Content Marketing Writer
description: Write blog posts, whitepapers, case studies, and newsletters that attract and convert leads. SEO knowledge is a must.

title: SEO Analyst
description: Conduct keyword research, technical SEO audits, and link-building strategies. Monitor Google Analytics and Search Console to improve organic rankings.

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain web applications using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Participate in agile sprints and code reviews.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design intuitive user interfaces and seamless user experiences for mobile and web apps. Proficiency in Figma and Adobe XD required.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor networks for security breaches, conduct penetration testing, and develop incident response plans. CISSP or CEH certification preferred.

title: High School Math Teacher
description: Teach mathematics to grades 9-12. Develop lesson plans, grade assignments, and mentor students for board exams.

title: Online Tutor – English
description: Conduct one-on-one and group English lessons via Zoom. Prepare students for IELTS and TOEFL exams.

title: University Lecturer – Computer Science
description: Deliver lectures in Data Structures, Algorithms, and AI. Supervise undergraduate research projects and publish academic papers.

title: Registered Nurse
description: Provide patient care in the ICU ward. Administer medications, monitor vitals, and coordinate with doctors on treatment plans.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense prescriptions, counsel patients on medication usage, and manage pharmacy inventory. Licensed pharmacist certification required.
